"CC\"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7615618198687206424","book_info":{"abstract":"穿越洪荒，我竟成了被后土祖巫捡回家的幼崽。开局偷吃玄冥灵果，被堵在树顶。本以为要完，我张口一吐——功德金云淹了半个巫族！元始、太一笑我捡了个废物？不好意思，我家幼崽靠吃证道。当诸圣还在苦求功德，我已经在拿大道功德当零食嚼了。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/42be6260ecf690f3c0ec292ab31dc88a~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"现代皇太后","author_id":"","book_id":"7615618198687206424","book_name":"洪荒：我被后土祖巫抱回家","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#181818","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2503人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":257,\"name\":\"玄幻脑洞\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257\u0026name=玄幻脑洞\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":7,\"name\":\"玄幻\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7\u0026name=玄幻\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":37,\"name\":\"穿越\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37\u0026name=穿越\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":19,\"name\":\"系统\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19\u0026name=系统\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":66,\"name\":\"洪荒\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=66\u0026name=洪荒\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":74,\"name\":\"宠物\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=74\u0026name=宠物\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":511,\"name\":\"东方玄幻\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511\u0026name=东方玄幻\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":852,\"name\":\"魂穿\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852\u0026name=魂穿\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7615829936049226302","read_count":"2503","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"212490"},"relate_post_id":"","relate
